mainEntity.name: How to prove injury work-related in Sandy Utah?
mainEntity.text: How to prove injury work-related in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Incident report, witness statements, surveillance video, consistent medical records.

suggestedAnswer.text: Sandy disputes common; gather employer logs, co-worker affidavits. Attorney subpoenas evidence, expert testimony.

name: Proving Work-Related Sandy
description: Incident report, witness statements, surveillance video, consistent medical records.
